zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Beaumont於1475年出生在英國英格蘭戴文尤爾斯頓時，她的父親Hugh Beaumont28歲，母親Thomasine Wise19歲。她於大約1495年與John Chichester在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1507年3月25日在英國英格蘭戴文享年32歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文布勞頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Beaumont于1475年出生在英国英格兰戴文尤爾斯頓时，她的父亲Hugh Beaumont28岁，母亲Thomasine Wise19岁。她于大约1495年与John Chichester在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1507年3月25日在英国英格兰戴文享年32岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文布勞頓。

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Beaumont was born in 1475, in Youlston, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh Beaumont, was 28 and her mother, Thomasine Wise, was 19. She married John Chichester about 1495, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 25 March 1507, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32, and was buried in Braunton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Beaumont est née en 1475, à Youlston, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Beaumont, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Wise, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John Chichester environ 1495, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 mars 1507, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterrée à Braunton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Beaumont 1475 in Youlston, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Beaumont 28 und ihre Mutter Thomasine Wise 19. Sie hat um 1495 in Devon, England John Chichester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. März 1507 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Braunton, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Beaumont è nata il nel 1475 nel Youlston, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh Beaumont, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Thomasine Wise, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John Chichester circa 1495, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 25 marzo 1507, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolta a Braunton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Beaumont(이)가 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 요우스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Beaumont(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thomasine Wise(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1495년 영국 데폰에서 John Chichester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1507년 3월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브라운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Beaumont nasceu em 1475, em Youlston, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh Beaumont, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Thomasine Wise, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John Chichester aproximadamente 1495, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de março de 1507, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 32 anos, e foi sepultada em Braunton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Beaumont родилась в 1475 г. в местности еулстон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh Beaumont было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Wise, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Chichester около 1495 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 25 марта 1507 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности браунтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Beaumont nació en 1475, en Youlston, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh Beaumont, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Thomasine Wise, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John Chichester aproximadamente 1495, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 25 de marzo de 1507, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultada en Braunton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
